# Mind the Gap

Mind the Gap helps users explore UK employer gender pay gap data across multiple years in one place.

## Key pages
- `/` Home and company search
- `/company/{employerId}` Employer detail pages with trend history

## Data source
All figures are derived from the UK Government Gender Pay Gap Service:
https://gender-pay-gap.service.gov.uk/

## Crawling guidance
- Public pages are intended to be indexed.
- API endpoints under `/api/` should not be indexed.
